stemHtml: Consider a Fly-By-Wire (FBW) large transport aircraft on the cruise, with its CG more aft than initially calculated. What could be a possible consequence of this?

options.a: The aircraft's stability will be improved due to the more aft CG.
options.b: The aircraft's pitch authority will decrease, leading to decreased manoeuvrability.
options.c: The calculated forces for a given pitch input can be too large, potentially exceeding limits.
options.d: The aircraft's roll control will become more sensitive, improving handling.
